title: 桜花賞の後に・心躍る挑戦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gives a splendid performance at the
Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having faced off against powerful opponents, the
thought of the even more difficult races ahead
lights a fire of determination within Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to do even better at the Japanese Oaks,
Air Groove keeps up the pace as she moves ever
forward.
